titleStmt.title: SII 9.696: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 696. (A.R. No. 273 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD TO THE NORTH OF KASAVANAHALLI, A HAMLET OF KADABAGERE, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1581, Vikāri, Phālguṇa, śu. 3, Śukravāra, corresponding to A.D. 1660 February 3, Friday. It records that Basavappa-Nāyaka of Bāguḷi, son (?) of king Veṅkaṭapati-Mahādēvarāya, made a gift of a plot of land to Tirukappa, son of Basavayya and grandson of Giremallapa, for having repopulated the village Kasavanahaḷḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . namastuṁgasirascuṁ
bhicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śābhaṁ
vē . svasti śrījayādbhudaya
śālivāhanaśakhavaruṣa 158
1 neya . vikārisaṁvatsarada phālgu
ṇa śu 3 sukruvāradalu śrīma(ṁ)nma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭa
patimahādēvarāyara komara bāgu
ḷi basavapanāyakarū kasavanaha
ḷiya puravargganu śrīrē
dēvarige koṭṭu yittu A
diṁdalu A puravargga Aramanege bidu
hōgi yiralāgi giremalapaṇana maga basa
vayanu Ujuni siṁhāsanada sisya
na(ṁ)mma birudu naṁma yaḷeya ba
yyagrāma jīrṇōdhdhāramaṁnū
māḍi taṁda kāraṇa gurusvāmi
maḷesvami paṭadaiyagaḷu va
kuḷada yare bhūminu naṁma moṁma
ga sāṁtarāuttana maga giremallappa A
tana maga basavayyana maga tiruka page
putrapautrapāraṁpariyāgi Aceṁ
drārkkavāgi koṭṭaṁta dānaśānasa .
�yo danake Aramaneyavarāga
lli koṭṭa krirttuvina bageyavarā
galli �yovaroḷage Āru tappi
dare Ā tappidavara bāyoḷa
ge kattetuṁṇi kalluppu . sva
dattadviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ parada
tanupālanaṁ paradatapahā
riṇāṁ svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ ba
vēttu . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.696 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
